message:
Running command: # Check if NC_LIB_ROOT/ip directory for IP cores (vs /nc/apps which is apps)
# The ip/ dir in project has symlinks to /nc/ip/... which is the nc_lib_root for IP cores
ls /nc/ip/ | head -20
echo ""
# Check if nc_lib_root should be /nc/ip or project_root/ip
ls /nc/apps/NC_AMBA 2>/dev/null || echo "No NC_AMBA in NC_LIB_ROOT"
ls /nc/ip/NC_AMBA 2>/dev/null | head -5

echo ""

ls /nc/apps/NC_AMBA 2>/dev/null || echo "No NC_AMBA in NC_LIB_ROOT"

args.command:
# Check if NC_LIB_ROOT/ip directory for IP cores (vs /nc/apps which is apps)
# The ip/ dir in project has symlinks to /nc/ip/... which is the nc_lib_root for IP cores
ls /nc/ip/ | head -20
echo ""
# Check if nc_lib_root should be /nc/ip or project_root/ip
ls /nc/apps/NC_AMBA 2>/dev/null || echo "No NC_AMBA in NC_LIB_ROOT"
ls /nc/ip/NC_AMBA 2>/dev/null | head -5
